source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/03_제품별 인증서 & 성적서/2. 제품별 성적서/04_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/1. IEC 60601-1 외/[A1717MCW] EN 60601-1-2 EMC CE CoC (ed. 4.1).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Nemko Certificate of Conformity for EMC assessment of H&abyz A1717MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides evidence of conformity with listed European EMC standards and MDD 93/42/EEC; authorizes the Nemko EMC Mark and supports CE marking if other applicable Directives are also confirmed.
keyPoints: Certificate No. KHF 240809 was issued for model A1717MCW.
Applicant and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
Documentation references Nemko Korea Test report No. REP016214.
Date of issue is 2024-02-20 and certificate revision is None.
The certificate is no longer valid if reference standards cease to exist or are replaced.

entities.name: Nemko Group
entities.evidence: A sample of this appliance has been subject to assessment by Nemko

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

entities.name: REP016214
entities.evidence: Documentation Nemko Korea Test report No. : REP016214

concepts.name: Medical Devices Directive (MDD) 93/42/EEC
concepts.evidence: Sufficient evidence of conformity with the listed standards of Medical Devices Directive (MDD) 93/42/EEC

concepts.name: CE-marking
concepts.evidence: may prepare an EU Declaration of Conformity and affix the below shown CE-marking

concepts.name: EU Declaration of Conformity
concepts.evidence: may prepare an EU Declaration of Conformity

concepts.name: Nemko EMC Mark
concepts.evidence: This certificate authorizes the manufacturer to affix the below shown Nemko EMC Mark

evidence.claim: The document is a Certificate of Conformity for Electromagnetic Compatibility.
Nemko assessed the sample and confirmed conformity with applicable European EMC standards listed in the certificate.
evidence.evidenceText: A sample of this appliance has been subject to assessment by Nemko, and is hereby confirmed to be in conformity with the applicable European EMC standards listed below.

evidence.claim: The certificate provides sufficient evidence of conformity with listed standards of Medical Devices Directive 93/42/EEC.
evidence.evidenceText: Sufficient evidence of conformity with the listed standards of Medical Devices Directive (MDD) 93/42/EEC in below has been provided.

evidence.claim: The certified product is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model A1717MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Model A1717MCW

evidence.claim: The applicant and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant H&abyz Co., Ltd. Manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The certificate references Nemko Korea Test report No. REP016214.
evidence.evidenceText: Documentation Nemko Korea Test report No. : REP016214

evidence.claim: The issue date is 2024-02-20 and certificate revision is None.
evidence.evidenceText: Date of issue 2024-02-20 Certificate revision: None

evidence.claim: The certificate authorizes affixing the Nemko EMC Mark to conforming products.
evidence.evidenceText: This certificate authorizes the manufacturer to affix the below shown Nemko EMC Mark to each conforming product.

evidence.claim: If other applicable Directives are confirmed, the manufacturer or European authorized representative may prepare an EU Declaration of Conformity and affix CE marking.
evidence.evidenceText: provided it is otherwise confirmed that the product also conforms with any other applicable Directives, the manufacturer (or the European authorized representative) may prepare an EU Declaration of Conformity and affix the below shown CE-marking

evidence.claim: The certificate is no longer valid if reference standards cease to exist or are replaced.
evidence.evidenceText: The certificate is no longer valid if any of the reference standards cease to exist or are replaced

reviewFlags.reason: Issuing body is Nemko; regulatory jurisdiction is represented by European EMC standards and MDD 93/42/EEC rather than a named government authority.
